title: Chill Bitmap Font-pack for Caxton
description: A pixel font available for Chinese/Japanese, Chill Bitmap Font (寒蝉点阵体). Required Caxton, compatible with shaders.
body:
![](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/87366329/160807604-8d5493fa-1d5b-40e7-afa7-e3a18cc248ac.png)
## About [Chill Bitmap (寒蝉点阵体)](https://github.com/Warren2060/Chill-Bitmap) for Minecraft [Caxton](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton). Chill Bitmap is a pixel style font supports Chinese(Simplified/Traditional) and Japanese characters. Tested under Minecraft 1.20.1 and Caxton 0.4.9. It should be available on any Minecraft version with Caxton version >4.0. --- About bold/italic styles: Due to Chill Bitmap doesn't have separate bold/italic font while Caxton required it, I generated those styles by FontForge style tool and renamed it to Chill*EX*. I may make this pack support vanilla Minecraft in the next versions. ## License These fonts are free software. Unlimited permission is granted to use, copy, and distribute them, with or without modification, either commercially or noncommercially. THESE FONTS ARE PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTY. 2022.3.20 Chill type. Copyright © 2020-2022 by warren2060. All rights reserved.
